scans.secretScan: No private key, credential, password, access-key, or unredacted secret pattern in sidecar-bound artifacts.
scans.privatePathScan: No private absolute home path occurs in sidecar-bound retained artifacts; raw trace remains external behind trajectory URI references.
scans.trainingDataLeakageScan: No hidden evaluation, future solution, unexecuted alternative, or post-outcome state is included in an earlier state hash.

redactions.replacement: semantic runtime labels, <maven-repository>, or trajectory:// reference

limitations: The immutable external trace itself contains machine-local paths and is not a training message artifact; consumers must dereference it only in controlled replay environments.
